A Price To Pay.name: A Price To Pay
A Price To Pay.description:
Casting Spirit Eclipse with 5 Spirits now resets the cooldown of Spirit Glaive and causes your next cast within 8 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

Spirit Glaives used in this way will reduce the cooldown of Shadowstalker by -15 sec.

Allcure Elixir.name: Allcure Elixir
Allcure Elixir.description: Removes all poison, disease and curse effects from an ally, and grants immunity to such effects for 3 sec.

Amphibimorph.name: Amphibimorph
Amphibimorph.description:
Transform enemies at target location into a frog, making them unable to attack or cast spells, and slowing their movement speed by -25% for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). While transformed into a frog the enemy is considered a Beast.

Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

Arcane Brew.name: Arcane Brew
Arcane Brew.description:
Throw your Arcane Brew at an ally, increasing their spell power and Spirit by 30 for 10 seconds.

Spell power scales with caster level.

Bad Juju.name: Bad Juju
Bad Juju.description:
Hurl a bolt of dark magic at an enemy, dealing 288 Shadow damage, scaling with your Spirit.

If the target is affected by |cffffffffHex of Malice|r it also reduces the target's healing received by 20% for 8 sec.

Base: Beast Blood.name: Base: Beast Blood
Base: Beast Blood.description:
Infuse your Cauldron with Beast Blood for 10 seconds, causing 15% of the direct Physical damage taken by allies within 40 yds to instead be dealt over time.

Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

Base: Crystal Water.name: Base: Crystal Water
Base: Crystal Water.description:
Infuse your Cauldron with Crystal Water for 10 seconds, causing allies within 40 yds to be shielded for 20% of their healing taken for 5 seconds.

Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

Berserking.name: Berserking
Berserking.description: Periodic damage dealt now has a 25% chance to increase the haste of your Serpent Wards by 3% for 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

Beware Da Voodoo.name: Beware Da Voodoo
Beware Da Voodoo.description: Increases the duration of Mimic Ward and Spirits by 4 sec.

Big Bad Voodoo.name: Big Bad Voodoo
Big Bad Voodoo.description:
Summon the spirit of Bwonsamdi for 8 sec. While within 15 yds, you are immune to all harmful spells and effects, but deal 50% reduced damage and healing.

While allies are within 15 yds, their damage taken is reduced by 20%.

Cannot be used within 2 min of benefitting from |cFFFFFFFFBig Bad Voodoo|r.

Blatant Curse.name: Blatant Curse
Blatant Curse.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Jinxes by -25%.

Blessing of Hir'eek.name: Blessing of Hir'eek
Blessing of Hir'eek.description: Your Hexbreak now removes an additional curse effect.

Brew Cocktail.name: Brew Cocktail
Brew Cocktail.description:
Brews 5 |cffffffffFetid Cocktail|r, providing the Witch Doctor and her allies with something to drink.

Conjured items disappear if logged out for more than 15 minutes.

Brew Stew.name: Brew Stew
Brew Stew.description:
Brews 5 |cFFFFFFFFFish Stew|r providing the Witch Doctor and their allies with something to eat.

Brewed items disappear if logged out for more than 15 minutes.

Brewmaster.name: Brewmaster
Brewmaster.description: Reduces the cast time of Loa's Brew by 0.25 sec.

Bwonsamdi's Edge.name: Bwonsamdi's Edge
Bwonsamdi's Edge.description: Your Spirit Eclipse now deals 40% increased damage when it explodes on impact.

Bwonsamdi's Gift.name: Bwonsamdi's Gift
Bwonsamdi's Gift.description:
While Mimic Ward is active, you now gain 15% increased ranged haste and your Reclamation transforms into Spirit Volley. 

Each Spirit now increases the damage of Spirit Volley by 3%.

In addition, direct ranged abilty damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Mimic Ward by -0.5 sec.

Call of Sseratus.name: Call of Sseratus
Call of Sseratus.description:
Summon 4 Serpent Wards near you for 15 seconds.

Scales with modifiers to Serpent Ward.

Cauldron Brewer.name: Cauldron Brewer
Cauldron Brewer.description:
Level 10 Passive
You may now prepare Ingredients into a Cauldron, crafting a brew. 

Nearby allies are buffed based on the active brew.

Only 1 of each Ingredient can be active at a time.

Chosen One.name: Chosen One
Chosen One.description: Your Mimic Ward will now summon 1 additional ward.

Cleansing Idol.name: Cleansing Idol
Cleansing Idol.description:
Drop a Cleansing Idol near you for 1 minute.

Allies within 30 yds have 1 poison and disease effect removed from them every 3 sec.

Concoct Rejuvenating Mojo.name: Concoct Rejuvenating Mojo
Concoct Rejuvenating Mojo.description: Concoct a minor rejuvenating mojo that can be used to instantly restore 100 health.

Cursed Effigy.name: Cursed Effigy
Cursed Effigy.description:
Drop a Cursed Effigy near you for 15 seconds.

Enemies within 15 yds are unable to critically strike.

Dambala's Lethality.name: Dambala's Lethality
Dambala's Lethality.description: After using Spirit Eclipse, the damage of your next Shadowflare within 15 seconds is increased by 50%.

Dark Effigy.name: Dark Effigy
Dark Effigy.description:
Your Bad Juju and Hexfire now strike 2 additional nearby enemies.

Shadowflare now deals 50% increased damage to enemies affected by Puppeteer's Threads.Puppeteer’s Threads (Debuff)Damage taken from the Witch Doctor stores 10% of its value. When the effect ends the damage stored is dealt instantly.

Dark Idol.name: Dark Idol
Dark Idol.description:
Drop a |cffffffffDark Idol|r near you for 1 min.

Allies within 30 yds gain 60 increased Shadow Resistance.

Dark Loa's Blessing.name: Dark Loa's Blessing
Dark Loa's Blessing.description:
Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Shadow Puppets now deals damage -20% faster.

Dark Loa's Incantation.name: Dark Loa's Incantation
Dark Loa's Incantation.description: Dealing damage with Shadowflare now applies Hex of Malice if it strikes at least 3 enemies.Hex of MaliceCurse an enemy, dealing 5 + 8% shadow SP + 10% ranged AP Shadow damage and an additional 96 Shadow damage over 24 seconds.

Dark Magic.name: Dark Magic
Dark Magic.description: Reduces the cast time of Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju by -0.3 sec.

Dark Mojo.name: Dark Mojo
Dark Mojo.description: Increases your chance to resist magic and curse effects by 20%.

Darkspear Traditionalist.name: Darkspear Traditionalist
Darkspear Traditionalist.description:
Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

Periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice now has a 20% chance to collect a Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

De Other Side.name: De Other Side
De Other Side.description:
Damage dealt by Shadow Puppets now increases your damage and critical strike chance by 1% for 20 seconds, stacking up to 10 times.

Additional procs do not refresh the duration.

Death Draught.name: Death Draught
Death Draught.description: Drink a potent voodoo draught that slows your body to a deathlike stillness for up to 5 minutes, causing you to feign death which may trick enemies into ignoring you.

Devotion to Bwonsamdi.name: Devotion to Bwonsamdi
Devotion to Bwonsamdi.description: Your direct damage now heals you for 10% of the damage done.

Disciple of Sseratus.name: Disciple of Sseratus
Disciple of Sseratus.description: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Loa's Brew and Spirit in a Bottle by 15%.

Doctor of the Jungle.name: Doctor of the Jungle
Doctor of the Jungle.description: Jungle Shrooms used from your Cauldron now ticks -3 sec faster.

Eye of Kimbul.name: Eye of Kimbul
Eye of Kimbul.description:
Critical strikes now apply Eye of Kimbul to enemies for 15 seconds.Eye of KimbulIncreases damage dealt and critical strike chance against this target by 1%, stacking 5 times.

While affected, enemies cannot stealth or turn invisible.

Fool's Play.name: Fool's Play
Fool's Play.description: Target an enemy and summon a copy of them for 20 seconds that attacks them and replicates their spells back on them.

For Da Loa!.name: For Da Loa!
For Da Loa!.description: Transforms Allcure Elixir into Mass Allcure Elixir.Mass Allcure ElixirRemoves all poison, disease and curse effects from party and raid members within 30 yds, and grants immunity to such effects for 3 seconds.

Frenzied Spirits.name: Frenzied Spirits
Frenzied Spirits.description:
Consumes your Spirits to increase your ranged critical strike rating by 10, critical damage by 5%, and causing you to heal for 2% of all damage dealt for each Spirit consumed.

In addition, you gain 1 Spirit every 1 sec while active.

Lasts for 3 sec per Spirit consumed.

Fresh Ingredients.name: Fresh Ingredients
Fresh Ingredients.description: Increases the healing of your Jungle Shrooms from your Cauldron by 15%.

Godslayer.name: Godslayer
Godslayer.description: Your Spirit Glaive now deals an additional 54 + 19% shadow SP + 14% ranged AP Shadow damage to up to 5 nearby enemies at the end of its duration.

Gonk's Blessing.name: Gonk's Blessing
Gonk's Blessing.description: Reduces the cooldown of Amphibimorph by -60 sec, but increases its cast time by 0.5 sec.

Graven Effigy.name: Graven Effigy

Greater Resourceful Wuju.name: Greater Resourceful Wuju
Greater Resourceful Wuju.description:
Empowers nearby party and raid members with da voodoo, reducing their resource costs by 5%. Lasts 30 min.

@ext:Can only have 1 |cffffffffWuju|r active on a target at a time.:ext@

Greater Spirit Wuju.name: Greater Spirit Wuju
Greater Spirit Wuju.description:
Imbue an ally with the spirit of Sen'jin for 30 min, increasing their Spirit by 35 and their magic resistances by 20.

@ext:Can only have 1 |cffffffffWuju|r active on a target at a time.:ext@

Growing Malice.name: Growing Malice
Growing Malice.description: Each tick of Hex of Malice increases the damage of the next tick on the enemy by 3%, stacking 10 times.

Hastened.name: Hastened
Hastened.description: Reduces the cooldown of all Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -25%.

Healing Ward.name: Healing Ward
Healing Ward.description: Drop a Healing Ward near you for 1 minute, healing 8 nearby allies within 30 yds for 48 + 20% SP + 12% ranged AP + 10% Spirit every 3 sec.

Hex of Death.name: Hex of Death
Hex of Death.description: Damage dealt by Malefic Arrow now reduces the targets healing received by -20% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Hex of Malice.name: Hex of Malice
Hex of Malice.description:
Curse an enemy, dealing 6 Shadow damage and an additional 88 Shadow damage over 24 sec.

@ext:Periodic damage dealt by this effect can critically strike.:ext@

Hexbreak.name: Hexbreak
Hexbreak.description: Break an ally's curse, dispelling 1 curse effect from them.

Hexfire.name: Hexfire
Hexfire.description: Blast an enemy with hexfire, dealing 102 Fire damage, scaling with your Spirit.

Hexfire Mass.name: Hexfire Mass
Hexfire Mass.description:
Damage dealt by Hex of Malice now has a 30% chance to summon a Serpent Ward on top of your enemy for 10 seconds to aid you in combat.

Can only occur once every 3 sec.

Hexing Effigy.name: Hexing Effigy
Hexing Effigy.description:
Drop a |cffffffffHexing Effigy|r near you for 1 min.

The next enemy that casts a spell on you is transformed into a frog for 40 sec. 

While transformed, they are unable to move, attack or cast spells. Damage dealt may interrupt this effect.

@ext:Can only have 1 |cffffffffEffigy|r active at a time.:ext@

Hexplosion.name: Hexplosion
Hexplosion.description: Your offensive critical strikes now increase your haste by 20% for 6 seconds.

Hir'eek's Jinx.name: Hir'eek's Jinx
Hir'eek's Jinx.description:
Curse a Beast, fearing them and increasing their movement speed by 25% for 40 sec (8 sec vs players).

Can only have 1 |cffffffffJinx|r active on a target at a time.

Hollow Spirit.name: Hollow Spirit
Hollow Spirit.description: Damage dealt by Shadowflare and Hexfire now increases the chance enemies are critically struck by 3% for 12 seconds.

Improved Malefic Arrow.name: Improved Malefic Arrow
Improved Malefic Arrow.description: Reduces the cooldown of Malefic Arrow by -2 sec.

Ingredient: Bloodthistle.name: Ingredient: Bloodthistle
Ingredient: Bloodthistle.description:
Brew Bloodthistle into your Cauldron.

Cauldron: Allies within 40 yds receive 8% increased healing.

Potion: Causes target ally to leech 5% of all damage they deal for 15 seconds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

Ingredient: Frog Bones.name: Ingredient: Frog Bones
Ingredient: Frog Bones.description:
Brew Frog Bones into your Cauldron.

Cauldron: Grants allies within 40 yds -3% reduced damage taken.

Potion: Grants target ally an absorption shield, absorbing 50 + 35% Spirit damage, scaling with Spirit.

Ingredient: Jungle Shrooms.name: Ingredient: Jungle Shrooms
Ingredient: Jungle Shrooms.description:
Brew Jungle Shrooms into your Cauldron.

Cauldron: Heal up to 8 allies within 30 yds for 34 + 15% healing every 8 sec.

Potion Toss: Heal the target ally for -3.75 to -2.75 every 3 sec for 18 seconds.

It's Da Mojo.name: It's Da Mojo
It's Da Mojo.description:
Level 50 Passive
Allows your Mojo Beam to critically heal.

It's Da Voodoo.name: It's Da Voodoo
It's Da Voodoo.description: Increases the damage of Shadowflare by 0%.

Jin'do's Wrath.name: Jin'do's Wrath
Jin'do's Wrath.description: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Hexfire by 25%.

Jinx of Decay.name: Jinx of Decay
Jinx of Decay.description: Your Lethargy Jinx now also reduces the target's periodic healing received by -30%.

Juju Injection.name: Juju Injection
Juju Injection.description: Increases your Agility and Intellect by 5%.

Juju Spirits.name: Juju Spirits
Juju Spirits.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your spell critical damage by 100% and increases the critical strike chance of Bad Juju by 5% for each active Spirit on you.

Jungle Booms.name: Jungle Booms
Jungle Booms.description: Jungle Shrooms when used with Potion Toss and Splash Potion now ticks -0.5 sec faster.

Jungle Idol.name: Jungle Idol
Jungle Idol.description:
Drop a |cffffffffJungle Idol|r near you for 1 min.

Allies within 30 yds gain 60 increased Nature Resistance.

Jungle Secrets.name: Jungle Secrets
Jungle Secrets.description: When you heal with Loa's Brew your Effigies will now heal an additional ally within 20 yds for 35% of the healing done, prioritizing allies with low health.

Krag'wa's Blessing.name: Krag'wa's Blessing
Krag'wa's Blessing.description: Your Amphibimorph is now instant cast.

Latent Curse.name: Latent Curse
Latent Curse.description: When your Shrinking Jinx is dispelled it now applies Misery to the dispeller.MiserySilences the target for 5 seconds and deals 9 + 60% shadow SP Shadow Damage every 1 sec for the duration.

Lethargy Jinx.name: Lethargy Jinx
Lethargy Jinx.description:
Curse an enemy for 10 sec, slowing their movement speed by 50%.

Can only have 1 |cffffffffJinx|r active on a target at a time.

Loa Communion.name: Loa Communion
Loa Communion.description: Increases the damage dealt by Veil of Darkness by 100%.

Loa Empowerment.name: Loa Empowerment
Loa Empowerment.description: Reduces the cost of your Wujus by -50% and increases the effectiveness of Power Wuju by 20%.

Loa Spirits.name: Loa Spirits
Loa Spirits.description:
Level 20 Passive
For each active Spirit on you, you have an 5% chance for your Reclamation to cast an additional time.

Loa's Blessing.name: Loa's Blessing
Loa's Blessing.description:
Level 30 Passive
Healing done by Loa's Brew now applies a random empowerment to the target ally.

Loa's Brew.name: Loa's Brew
Loa's Brew.description: Brew a potion and then throw it to an ally target, restoring 95 health.

Loa's Strength.name: Loa's Strength
Loa's Strength.description: Increases your Agility and your Nature and Shadow damage dealt by 3%.

Malefic Arrow.name: Malefic Arrow
Malefic Arrow.description: Transforms your Malefic Wrath into Malefic Arrow.Malefic ArrowLaunch a voodoo arrow at an enemy, dealing 85% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 25 + 20% ranged AP + 25% nature SP as Nature damage, healing you equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

Malefic Wrath.name: Malefic Wrath
Malefic Wrath.description: Hurl voodoo energy at an enemy, dealing 42 Nature damage.

Malicious Golems.name: Malicious Golems
Malicious Golems.description:
Summoning your War Golem now increases your spell haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

In addition, periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice and damage dealt by Shadow Puppets will reduce the cooldown of War Golem by -0.5 sec.

Malignant.name: Malignant
Malignant.description: Damage dealt by Bad Juju and Hexfire now spreads Hex of Malice to up to 1 nearby enemy.

Malignant Jinx.name: Malignant Jinx
Malignant Jinx.description:
Curse an enemy for 8 seconds, causing their next spell cast to silence them for 5 sec.

Can only have 1 Jinx active on a target at a time.

Mana Jinx.name: Mana Jinx
Mana Jinx.description:
Curse an enemy for 8 sec, leeching 100 mana every 2 sec and preventing mana regeneration.

Can only have 1 |cffffffffJinx|r active on a target at a time.

Master Mixologist.name: Master Mixologist
Master Mixologist.description: For 10 seconds, the effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients is increased by 100% and you can cast Spirit in a Bottle while moving.

Master of Concoctions.name: Master of Concoctions
Master of Concoctions.description: Increases the duration of Ingredients by 20% and causes allies affected by Jungle Shrooms to heal for 5% of the damage they deal with their next 3 offensive abilities or spells for 15 seconds.

Mimic Ward.name: Mimic Ward
Mimic Ward.description: Summon a mimic ward for 12 seconds. For the duration when you cast Malefic Wrath and Loa's Brew the ward will also cast it on your target.

Mirage.name: Mirage
Mirage.description:
Become invisible for 20 seconds, gaining 5 Spirits, leaving a copy of yourself behind, and reducing threat each second. Direct damage or healing done will end this effect.

While invisible, you can only see other invisible targets and those who can see invisible.

Mojo Beam.name: Mojo Beam

Mojo Cauldron.name: Mojo Cauldron
Mojo Cauldron.description: Create a Cauldron of Rejuvenating Mojo. Raid members may interact with the Cauldron to acquire a |cFFFFFFFFMajor Rejuvenating Mojo|r. The cauldron lasts for 3 min or 25 charges.

Mojo High.name: Mojo High
Mojo High.description: Your Mimic Ward now summons 1 additional Mimic Ward and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

Mojo Madness.name: Mojo Madness
Mojo Madness.description: Damage and healing done now have a 5% chance to reduce the cost of your next spell or ability by -100% for 10 seconds.

Mojo Wave.name: Mojo Wave
Mojo Wave.description:
Level 40 Passive
Healing with Mojo Beam now heals up to 3 of the lowest health nearby allies within 20 yds for 75% of the healing done.

Mojo: Fish Bones.name: Mojo: Fish Bones
Mojo: Fish Bones.description:
Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Fish Bones to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Fish Oil and Frog Bones.

Mojo: Frog Shrooms.name: Mojo: Frog Shrooms
Mojo: Frog Shrooms.description:
Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Frog Shrooms to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Frog Bones.

Mojo: Jungle Thistle.name: Mojo: Jungle Thistle
Mojo: Jungle Thistle.description:
Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Jungle Thistle to affected allies.

Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Bloodthistle.

One Armed Waltz.name: One Armed Waltz
One Armed Waltz.description: Big Bad Voodoo now only reduces damage dealt by 25% and reduces damage taken by an additional -5%.

Overflowing Juju.name: Overflowing Juju
Overflowing Juju.description:
Level 30 Passive
Damage dealt by your Shadow Puppets and Puppeteer's Threads now has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Bad Juju and cause your next cast to incur an -8 sec reduced cooldown.

Plentiful Potions.name: Plentiful Potions
Plentiful Potions.description: Reduces the cost of your Loa's Brew and Hexbreak by -10%.

Potent Mixes.name: Potent Mixes
Potent Mixes.description: Increases your healing done by 4% and reduces the threat generated by your spells by -15%.

Potion Boss.name: Potion Boss
Potion Boss.description: Increases the effectiveness of Potion Toss and your tossed Ingredients by 20%.

Potion Toss.name: Potion Toss
Potion Toss.description:
Fill a potion from your |cffffffffCauldron|r, and toss it at a friendly target, healing them for 179.

The effect of |cffffffffPotion Toss|r will change based on your active |cffffffffIngredients|r.

Power Wuju.name: Power Wuju
Power Wuju.description:
Give an ally some wuju mon, increasing their melee and ranged attack power by 30. Lasts 30 min.

@ext:Can only have 1 |cffffffffWuju|r active on a target at a time.:ext@

Presence of the Loa.name: Presence of the Loa
Presence of the Loa.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 4%.

Prolonged Malice.name: Prolonged Malice
Prolonged Malice.description: Increases the duration of your Hex of Malice by 6 sec and the range of your offensive Voodoo spells by 6 yds.

Puppeteer's Grasp.name: Puppeteer's Grasp
Puppeteer's Grasp.description: Transform into a malignant spirit for 30 seconds, allowing you to cast Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju while moving, and periodically granting you a Spirit every 2 sec.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Puppeteer's Threads.name: Puppeteer's Threads
Puppeteer's Threads.description:
Level 10 Passive
Damaging abilities now leave behind Puppeteer's Threads on enemies for 10 seconds. Puppeteer’s Threads (Debuff)Damage taken from the Witch Doctor stores 10% of its value. When the effect ends the damage stored is dealt instantly.

Rage Brew.name: Rage Brew
Rage Brew.description:
Throw your Rage Brew at an ally, regenerating 50% of their maximum Rage, Energy, and Focus. 

Increases their attack power and ranged attack power by 15% for 10 seconds.

Reclaim Soul.name: Reclaim Soul
Reclaim Soul.description:
Brings a dead ally back to life with 70 health and 135 mana.

Cannot be cast when in combat.

Reclamation.name: Reclamation
Reclamation.description:
Shoot a quick voodoo arrow at an enemy dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 25 as Nature damage and collecting a |CffffffffSpirit|r.@s:561136:0@

Usable while moving.

Residual Energy.name: Residual Energy
Residual Energy.description: At the end of Shadow Avatar's duration you become a Lesser Shadow Avatar.Lesser Shadow AvatarIncreases magic damage dealt by 10% and reduces the cooldown of Spirit Glaive by 20% every 1 sec. Lasts for 8 seconds.

Rite of the Loa.name: Rite of the Loa
Rite of the Loa.description: Simultaneously places each selected |cffffffffWard|r, |cffffffffEffigy|r, and |cffffffffIdol|r all at once.

Ritual Hexing.name: Ritual Hexing
Ritual Hexing.description: Increases the damage of Bad Juju, Malefic Wrath and Hexfire by 10% against enemies affected by Hex of Malice.

Seeker.name: Seeker
Seeker.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -20%.

Sen'jin's Apprentice.name: Sen'jin's Apprentice
Sen'jin's Apprentice.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your ranged attack power by 100% of your Intellect and your ranged attack power and spell power by 25% of your Agility.

Sen'jin's Presence.name: Sen'jin's Presence
Sen'jin's Presence.description: Casting Potion Toss and Spirit in a Bottle now reduce the cast time of your next 2 Loa's Brews by -20% for 10 seconds.

Sen'jin's Swiftness.name: Sen'jin's Swiftness
Sen'jin's Swiftness.description: Reduces the cooldown of Mirage by -60 sec.

Sentry Ward.name: Sentry Ward
Sentry Ward.description: Drop a |cffffffffSentry Ward|r near you for 1 min that reveals all stealthed and invisible enemies near it.

Serene Idol.name: Serene Idol
Serene Idol.description:
Drop a |cffffffffSerene Idol|r near you for 1 min.

Allies within 30 yds gain 30% reduced spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks.

Serpent Handler.name: Serpent Handler
Serpent Handler.description: Increases the cooldown of Call of Sseratus by 5 sec, but increases the amount of Serpent Wards summoned by it by 2.

Serpent's Guile.name: Serpent's Guile
Serpent's Guile.description: Your Malefic Arrow now deals an additional 15% of its damage dealt every 1 sec for 4 seconds as Nature damage.

Shadow Avatar.name: Shadow Avatar
Shadow Avatar.description: Become empowered by shadow magic for 15 sec, increasing your haste and reducing your Shadow damage taken by 20%.

Shadow Effigy.name: Shadow Effigy

Shadow Enchantments.name: Shadow Enchantments
Shadow Enchantments.description: Increases the duration and effectiveness of your Jinxes by 25%.

Shadow Puppets.name: Shadow Puppets
Shadow Puppets.description:
Summon a |cffffffffShadow Puppet|r that collects a |cffffffffSpirit|r and rushes towards your target, dealing 35 Shadow damage, repeating every 0.75 sec for 3 sec.
@ext:@s:561136:0@:ext@

Shadowflare.name: Shadowflare
Shadowflare.description:
Rain down shadow magic at a location, dealing 58 Shadow damage to all enemies.

Killing an enemy with this spell grants you a |cffffffffSpirit|r.@s:561136:0@

Shadowhunter.name: Shadowhunter
Shadowhunter.description:
Level 10 Passive
Allows you to auto shoot with a ranged weapon.

In addition, reduces the mana cost of all spells and abilities by -25%.

Shadowstalker.name: Shadowstalker
Shadowstalker.description: Disappear into darkness, entering an improved stealth mode, clearing all harmful effects, and increasing movement speed by 50% for 20 seconds.

Shrinking Jinx.name: Shrinking Jinx
Shrinking Jinx.description:
Curse an enemy for 20 sec, reducing their size and their attack power by 21 and spell power by 10.

Can only have 1 |cffffffffJinx|r active on a target at a time.

Slither.name: Slither
Slither.description:
Transform into a serpent, removing all movement impairing effects and increasing movement speed by 80% for 5 seconds.

You cannot attack or cast spells, but chance to be hit by ranged attacks and spells is reduced by -100% for the duration.

Soul Feeder.name: Soul Feeder
Soul Feeder.description: Increases the damage dealt by Malefic Arrow by 5% for each active Spirit on you.

Spice: Earthroot.name: Spice: Earthroot
Spice: Earthroot.description:
Infuse your Cauldron with Spice: Earthbloom.

Increases effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients by 30%.

Spice: Peacebloom.name: Spice: Peacebloom
Spice: Peacebloom.description:
Infuse your Cauldron with Spice: Peacebloom.

Reduces the duration of roots, stuns, and snares against allies within 40 yds by -25%.

Spirit Eclipse.name: Spirit Eclipse
Spirit Eclipse.description:
Unleash your |cffffffffSpirits|r on an enemy, dealing 11 Shadow damage every 0.20 sec for each active |cffffffffSpirit|r.

Each |cffffffffSpirit|r explodes on impact, dealing 3 Shadow damage to other nearby enemies within 5 yds of the target.

Spirit Glaive.name: Spirit Glaive
Spirit Glaive.description:
Toss spectral glaives that strikes enemies it passes through, dealing 119 Shadow damage, and reducing their Shadow Resistance by 3 for 5 sec.

Usable while moving. Cast time scales with your Agility.

Spirit Healer.name: Spirit Healer
Spirit Healer.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases healing power by 25% of Spirit and increases spell critical strike chance by 10% of Spirit.

Spirit Hunting.name: Spirit Hunting
Spirit Hunting.description: Each active Spirit gives you a 15% chance when you cast Malefic Arrow to generate an additional Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Spirit Idol.name: Spirit Idol
Spirit Idol.description:
Drop a |cffffffffSpirit Idol|r near you for 15 sec.

Allies within 30 yds regenerate 4% maximum mana every 3 sec.

Spirit Out Of The Bottle.name: Spirit Out Of The Bottle
Spirit Out Of The Bottle.description:
Casting Spirit in a Bottle now grants Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

@ifknown:500950:In addition, channeling Mojo Beam causes Spirit in a Bottle to affect 3 additional allies near the primary target.:ifknown@

Spirit Shock.name: Spirit Shock
Spirit Shock.description: Shock an enemy's spirit, silencing them for 4 seconds and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 4 seconds.

Spirit Striker.name: Spirit Striker
Spirit Striker.description: Increases the proc chance of Voodoo Fire by 10%.

Spirit Walker.name: Spirit Walker
Spirit Walker.description: Increases the duration and effectiveness of Vol'jin's Vigil and Swift Idol by 10%.

Spirit Warden.name: Spirit Warden
Spirit Warden.description: Summoning an Idol now increases your Spirit by 10% for 1 minute.

Spirit Wuju.name: Spirit Wuju
Spirit Wuju.description:
Imbue an ally with the spirit of Sen'jin for 30 min, increasing their Spirit by 3 and their magic resistances by 5.

@ext:Can only have 1 |cffffffffWuju|r active on a target at a time.:ext@

Spirit in a Bottle.name: Spirit in a Bottle
Spirit in a Bottle.description: Send a spirit to an ally, healing them for 109 and dealing damage to up to 5 enemies within 5 yds of them equal to 4% of the healing done.

Spiritual Devotee.name: Spiritual Devotee
Spiritual Devotee.description: Collecting a Spirit now instantly restores 3% of your maximum mana.

Spiritual Traditions.name: Spiritual Traditions
Spiritual Traditions.description: Allows 40% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting and reduces your spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 70%.

Splash On 'Em.name: Splash On 'Em
Splash On 'Em.description: Effective healing done by Loa's Brew and Mojo Beam reduce the cooldown of Potion Toss and Splash Potion by -1 sec.

Splash Potion.name: Splash Potion
Splash Potion.description:
Fill a splash potion from your |cffffffffCauldron|r, and toss it at a location, healing up to 8 allies for 73.

|cffffffffPotion|r effects from |cffffffffIngredients|r used this way have reduced effectiveness.

Staff of the Coven.name: Staff of the Coven
Staff of the Coven.description: Increases your Spirit by 8% and your hit chance by 2%.

Stasis Ward.name: Stasis Ward

Stranglethorn Style.name: Stranglethorn Style
Stranglethorn Style.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 4% and reduces threat generated by your Voodoo spells by -20%.

Strength of Da Loa.name: Strength of Da Loa
Strength of Da Loa.description:
Increases the attack power of party and raid members by 5%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, health and mana restoration provided by your Spirits now occurs -50% more often.

Swift Idol.name: Swift Idol
Swift Idol.description:
Drop a Swift Idol near you for 10 seconds.

Allies within 30 yds gain 25% increased movement speed and their chance to resist movement impairing effects is increased by 25%.

The Price of Power.name: The Price of Power
The Price of Power.description: Voice of Bwonsamdi now increases your Spirit by 100%.

The True Spirit.name: The True Spirit
The True Spirit.description: Summoning a Serpent Ward or Spirit now increases the damage of your next Spirit Glaive or Spirit Eclipse by 6% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Touch of Mueh'zala.name: Touch of Mueh'zala
Touch of Mueh'zala.description: Increases the duration of Stasis Ward's stun effect by 1 sec.

Touch of the Spirits.name: Touch of the Spirits
Touch of the Spirits.description: Damage dealt by Spirit In a Bottle causes the enemies to take 3% more damage and deal -3% less damage for 15 seconds.

Unstable Concoction.name: Unstable Concoction
Unstable Concoction.description:
Potion Toss now applies Unstable Concoction to the target for 20 seconds. 

Using Loa's Brew or Spirit in a Bottle on the target will trigger an explosion of mojo around the target, healing nearby allies within 20 yds for 177 + 40% healing.

Veil of Darkness.name: Veil of Darkness
Veil of Darkness.description:
Envelop a target in a shadowy voodoo veil, increasing the damage you deal to them by 15% for 15 seconds.

If you are within 40 yds of the target you deal 195 + 10% shadow SP + 4.5% AP Shadow damage to them every 2 second.

Village Wisdom.name: Village Wisdom
Village Wisdom.description: Increases your hit chance by 5% and the damage of Reclamation by 15%.

Viper Ward.name: Viper Ward
Viper Ward.description:
Transforms Call of Sseratus into Viper Ward.Viper WardSummons a powerful and fast-attacking Viper Ward at target location for 20 seconds.

Viper Wards have a 50% chance to unleash a Hexfire Blast, dealing 216 + 15% ranged AP Fire damage to an enemy.

Chance increased based on your ranged critical strike rating.

Voice of Bwonsamdi.name: Voice of Bwonsamdi
Voice of Bwonsamdi.description:
Let the spirit of Bwonsamdi possess you for 15 seconds.

Dealing periodic damage unleashes a trapped voodoo spirit at enemies, exploding for 162 + 25% shadow SP Shadow damage.

Vol'jin's Blessing.name: Vol'jin's Blessing
Vol'jin's Blessing.description: While Shadow Avatar is active, the cooldown of Spirit Glaive is now reduced by 20% every 1 sec.

Vol'jin's Vigil.name: Vol'jin's Vigil
Vol'jin's Vigil.description: Embrace the way of Vol'jin, reducing your damage taken by -25% and healing you for 2% of your maximum health every 1 sec for 10 seconds.

Voodoo Cauldron.name: Voodoo Cauldron
Voodoo Cauldron.description:
Place down a Voodoo Cauldron for 15 seconds, increasing allies' healing received by 20% while near the cauldron.

Allies within 15 yds are healed for 300 + 60% healing every 1.5 sec for 15 seconds.

Voodoo Fire.name: Voodoo Fire
Voodoo Fire.description: Your Serpent Ward's attacks now have a 20% chance to shoot Voodoo Fire, dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPN), 73*1+ranged AP*0.03+SPFI*0.12, 73*1+ranged AP*0.03+SPN*0.12) Fire damage to up to 3 nearby enemies.

Voodoo Hunger.name: Voodoo Hunger
Voodoo Hunger.description: While Shadowstalker or Mirage is active, every 1 sec you now gain a stack of Voodoo Hunger.Voodoo HungerIncreases the damage of your next Malefic Arrow by 10%, stacking 10 times. Lasts 8 seconds.

Voodoo Mind.name: Voodoo Mind
Voodoo Mind.description: Shadow Puppets now ticks -10% faster and lasts 10% longer for each Spirit active on you.

Voodoo Power.name: Voodoo Power
Voodoo Power.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 50% of your Spirit and your spell hit rating by 5% of your Spirit.

Voodoo Spirits.name: Voodoo Spirits
Voodoo Spirits.description: Hexfire now snaps your Puppeteer's Threads on your target, unleashing its damage on them instantly and collecting one Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Voodoo Strings.name: Voodoo Strings
Voodoo Strings.description: When Bad Juju is used on enemies affected by Puppeteer's Threads, it strikes an additional time every 1 sec for 30% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds as Nature damage.

Voodoo Unleashed.name: Voodoo Unleashed
Voodoo Unleashed.description: Your Mimic Wards now also cast Bad Juju and casting Bad Juju now reduces the cooldown of Shadow Puppets by -3 sec.

War Golem.name: War Golem
War Golem.description: Summon a War Golem for 10 seconds, absorbing damage dealt to you based on your Intellect, and redirecting harmful spells cast on nearby allies to itself.

Will of the Serpent.name: Will of the Serpent
Will of the Serpent.description: Your Lethargy Jinx now increases your critical strike chance against the target by 10%.

Wizened.name: Wizened
Wizened.description: Increases your maximum mana by 5% and reduces the mana cost of spells and abilities by -3%.

Zalazane's Malice.name: Zalazane's Malice
Zalazane's Malice.description: Increases the damage of Hex of Malice by 15% and the duration of Jinxes by 2 sec.
